common.loadingWorkspaceDesc: Reading product context first, then loading page data via real APIs.

common.networkSlow: Slow network detected. Data loading may be delayed.

nav.complianceDesc: Manage absolute claims and compliance terms

material.uploadWorkspaceDesc: Maintains product context isolation. Uses multipart upload and backend slicing pipeline.
material.dragHere: Drag materials here, or click the button to select files
material.dragHereDesc: Supports video and image files. Uploaded files enter the real slicing/search pipeline.

material.searchPlaceholder2: e.g. handheld showcase, unboxing close-up, white background rotation

material.detailUnavailable2: Details for {{fileName}} are currently unavailable. Please refresh and retry.

material.visionAnalyzeFailed: AI vision analysis failed, please try again later
material.confirmDeleteMaterial: Confirm deletion of this material and its slices?
material.confirmPermanentDelete: Confirm permanent deletion? This action cannot be undone!
material.sliceSearchDesc: Semantic search and structured filtering by product context.
material.trashListDesc: Deleted materials, recoverable or permanently deletable

material.sellingPointsHint: e.g. Moisturizing, Light & Non-greasy, Medical-grade Ingredients

script.generateDesc: Keep three entry points: quick / viral rewrite / template, all connected to real Nest APIs.
script.scriptListDesc: Pull real script list by product. Current draft can continue Patch editing and saving.
script.editorDesc: Select a shot to generate JSON Patch directly and display timing suggestions on the right in real-time.

script.subtitle: Subtitle
script.title: Script Title (optional)

script.aiUnavailable: Unable to connect to AI service

script.constraintPlaceholder: Constraints, comma or newline separated, e.g. no exaggerated claims, show USP in first 3s
script.uploadHint: Click or drag to upload your own video
script.uploadSubHint: Supports MP4 format. AI analysis will be triggered automatically after upload.
script.constraintOverride: Constraint overrides, comma or newline separated
script.viralIdHint: Auto-filled after analyzing video via the Viral Rewrite panel
script.strategyPlaceholder: User strategy description, e.g. Open with contrast to highlight pain points, middle shows key features...
script.constraintUserPlaceholder: User constraints, comma or newline separated
script.styleBatchPlaceholder: Style tones, comma separated, e.g. High-conversion UGC, Strong-rhythm voiceover, Unboxing comparison
script.remixInstructionPlaceholder: e.g. Keep the opening rhythm, emphasize product close-ups...

script.durationExceeded: Total duration exceeds limit (max 15s). Please shorten shot durations or delete shots first.
script.shotDurationInvalid: Invalid shot duration (per shot 1.5–5s). Please adjust duration first.
script.voiceoverTooLong: Voiceover script exceeds shot duration. Please shorten the script or increase shot duration.
script.timingFailed: Timing check failed. Please adjust shot duration or voiceover script.
script.insertExceeded: Inserting a new shot will exceed the 15s total limit. Please shorten or delete existing shots first.
script.internalError: Internal server error. Please ensure the Docker gateway is running and VOLC_ARK_API_KEY is configured.
script.modelUnavailable: AI model service unavailable. Please check VOLC_ARK_API_KEY and text endpoint configuration.

script.factorJsonInvalid: Factor Override JSON format is invalid
